rl.label: Bari (L1F1_CK1)
rl.agent: ForagerQLearning — 1 learn-rate, 1 forget-rate, 1-step choice kernel, softmax
rl.params: learn_rate, forget_rate_unchosen, choice_kernel_relative_weight, choice_kernel_step_size, biasL, softmax_inverse_temperature

bari.label: Bari (L1F1_CK1)
bari.agent: ForagerQLearning — 1 learn-rate, 1 forget-rate, 1-step choice kernel, softmax
bari.params: learn_rate, forget_rate_unchosen, choice_kernel_relative_weight, choice_kernel_step_size, biasL, softmax_inverse_temperature

hattori.label: Hattori (L2F1)
hattori.agent: ForagerQLearning — 2 learn-rates (asymmetric α+/α−), 1 forget-rate, no choice kernel, softmax
